subject: [PATCH v2 5/9] mm: memcontrol: track MEMCG_KMEM per NUMA node

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch introduces per-node obj_cgroup objects to track MEMCG_KMEM statistics for NUMA nodes. It removes the MEMCG_KMEM field and wires generic functions to use the new per-node accounting. The patch does not convert kmem users to proper per-memcg-per-node accounting, which is done in subsequent patches. This change aims to improve memory management and tracking on systems with multiple NUMA nodes.
